_comment: Authoring input for the fixture pipeline (WP-0). Each entry pins a scenario to a real date and area of operations so tools/fixtures/index.mjs can freeze real geodata into src/scenarios/fixtures/<id>/. Coordinates are the scenario startPosition; realDate is the modelled real-world incident date. Observed weather is applied to realistic INCIDENT scenarios only — NOT to the demo_basic onboarding tutorial, whose real-day weather can close launch bays (>30kt gust) and must stay launchable. Extend this list to cover more of the 21 incident scenarios.

scenarios.name: FEMA USAR — Hurricane Ian, Fort Myers Beach
scenarios.note: Hurricane Ian landfall near Fort Myers Beach / Estero Island. Real ERA5 winds (59kt sustained, 110kt gust) correctly ground the fleet — the sim refusing to launch into documented hurricane conditions IS the realism.

scenarios.name: SAR — Coastal / Ocean Beach
scenarios.note: Representative San Francisco summer marine-layer morning.
